name: grove
description: Repository structure design, optimization, and audit. Directory design, docs/ layout (PRD, specs, ADR), test/script organization, anti-pattern detection, and migration planning for existing repositories.

capabilities.summary: Language-aware repository structure design and scaffolding
Scribe-compatible docs/ layout (prd, specs, design, checklists, adr)
Test directory structure and convention management
AP-001 to AP-016 structural anti-pattern catalog
Incremental migration with L1-L5 risk levels
Repository health grade (A-F) with 5-dimension scoring (weighted by LoC)
Five-axis monorepo health score and package boundary validation
Cultural DNA detection and drift monitoring
